--- Main Page ---
Mariscos La Riviera Nayarit | Best Seafood in Gwinnett Village, GA | Seafood near me
Welcome to Mariscos La Riviera Nayarit – Jimmy Carter Boulevard
The Norcross location on Jimmy Carter Blvd is easy to reach from Peachtree Corners, Duluth, and nearby areas. Close to shops and businesses, it’s perfect for lunch, dinner, or a casual meal. Guests enjoy fresh seafood, tacos, and shellfish in a welcoming space with convenient parking and classic Mexican dishes made from fresh ingredients any day of the week.
Image gallery
Close
Close
Mariscos La Riviera Nayarit – Jimmy Carter, GA
Address: 5385 Jimmy Carter Blvd, Norcross, GA 30093, United States

Find Us
Fresh Seafood & Mexican Favorites, Made Easy
Mariscos La Riviera Nayarit’s menu is built around fresh seafood and well-known Mexican favorites. Enjoy shrimp, fish, tilapia, lobster, and shellfish prepared with care, along with tacos, aguachiles, and hearty carne asada. The menu also includes cocktails, mojitos, martinis, and mezcalitas to complete your meal. Whether you dine in or order out, the menu offers clear choices, fresh ingredients, and meals that are easy to enjoy any day of the week.
Explore Our Menu
Vibrant Coastal Flavors & Exceptional Service
Experience the authentic taste of the coast at Mariscos La Riviera Nayarit in Norcross. Guests love our large charolas to share and fresh aguas frescas. Enjoy dishes like shrimp ceviche or grilled salmon with mango in a lively, welcoming atmosphere. Perfect for families and friends, our restaurant offers generous portions, attentive service, and a festive dining experience everyone will enjoy.
Fresh Seafood, Just a Few Clicks Away
Ordering from Mariscos La Riviera Nayarit is quick and simple. Our online ordering makes it easy to get your favorite seafood and Mexican dishes without hassle. Choose delivery or takeout and enjoy shrimp, fish, tacos, aguachiles, and more made fresh and packed with care. Clear menus, smooth checkout, and reliable service help you get great food fast, whether it’s a busy weeknight or a relaxed weekend meal.
Order Now
A Look at Fresh Seafood and Mexican Favorites!
Here’s a sneak peek of the items our customers can’t stop talking about
Image gallery

Close
Sip, Savor, and Refresh with Every Drink!🍹
Image gallery

Catering Made Simple for Any Event
Mariscos La Riviera Nayarit offers catering that makes hosting easy and stress free. Our catering menu includes seafood and Mexican favorites like shrimp, fish, tacos, aguachiles, and carne asada, all prepared with fresh ingredients and packed with care. Whether you are planning a family gathering, office lunch, or special celebration, our team helps you serve food your guests will enjoy. With clear options and reliable service, our catering lets you focus on your event while we handle the food.
Cater With Us
Enjoy Fresh Flavors Right at Our Table
Enjoy a relaxed dining experience at Mariscos La Riviera Nayarit, where fresh seafood and classic Mexican dishes are served in a warm, welcoming space. From shrimp, fish, and tilapia to tacos, aguachiles, and carne asada, every meal is made with care. Pair your food with cocktails, mojitos, or martinis while you enjoy friendly service and a comfortable atmosphere. Dining in makes it easy to savor every dish the way it was meant to be enjoyed.
Visit Us Today!
Open daily for fresh seafood, tacos, aguachiles, and more in a warm, welcoming space!
Hours of operations:
Monday – Thursday: 10 AM – 10 PM
Friday – Saturday: 10 AM – 11 PM
Sunday: 10 AM – 10 PM
